title: Nazrul Haque
text:
Hello! I am Nazrul Haque, a PhD student at Nicolaus Copernicus University. Welcome to my personal website.

Research & Mathematics
Here is an example of an inline LaTeX math formula: \(f(x) = \sin(x) + e^x\).
And here is a beautifully centered display equation:
\[\int_{a}^{b} f(x) \, dx = F(b) - F(a)\]
